task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Vitals or Observations section in the Bahmni consultation page showing Temperature 38.4, Pulse 96, Blood Pressure 132/84, Respiratory Rate 20, SpO2 97, and Weight 64.

task_completion.description: Document the Penicillin allergy with reaction and severity
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Allergies section showing 'Penicillin' as the allergen, 'Urticaria' as the reaction, and 'Moderate' as the severity.

task_completion.description: Prescribe Ciprofloxacin 500mg orally twice daily for 10 days
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Medications or Treatments section showing an order for 'Ciprofloxacin' (500mg) with instructions for oral administration, twice daily (or BID), for a duration of 10 days.

task_completion.description: Order Complete Blood Count and C-Reactive Protein investigations
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Investigations or Orders section showing 'Complete Blood Count' (or CBC) and 'C-Reactive Protein' (or CRP) added to the patient's orders.

task_completion.description: Record Appendicitis as primary and Wound Infection as secondary diagnoses
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Diagnoses section showing 'Appendicitis' marked as Primary (and Confirmed) and 'Wound Infection' marked as Secondary.

task_completion.description: Write a clinical progress note of at least 200 characters
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a Consultation Note or Observation text box containing a detailed progress note (at least 3-4 lines of text) discussing the post-operative assessment, antibiotic rationale, and follow-up plan.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Bahmni web interface
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Bahmni web application running in a browser, not terminal commands or API testing tools.

integrity.description: The agent performed actions on the correct patient
integrity.visual_evidence: The patient header in the Bahmni interface should clearly show 'Grace Nakamura' or 'BAH000025'.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal scripts or direct database queries to complete the task
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal windows open showing curl commands, mysql queries, or python scripts interacting with the Bahmni backend.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Patient: Grace Aiko Nakamura (BAH000025). Required Vitals: Temperature 38.4C, Pulse 96, BP 132/84 mmHg, Respiratory Rate 20, SpO2 97%, Weight 64 kg. Required Allergy: Penicillin (Reaction: Urticaria, Severity: Moderate). Required Medication: Ciprofloxacin 500mg orally twice daily for 10 days (no Penicillin-class drugs should be prescribed). Required Investigations: Complete Blood Count, C-Reactive Protein. Required Diagnoses: Appendicitis (Primary), Wound Infection (Secondary). Clinical note must be at least 200 characters long.
